project.description: Download the current auth-hpds.env and open-hpds.env files that have been configured for HPDS.

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash
set -e # Source folder containing the scripts source_scripts_folder="${JENKINS_HOME}/workspace/Bash_Functions/" ls -la "$source_scripts_folder"
# Iterate through the files in the folder and source them for script_file in "$source_scripts_folder"*.sh; do chmod +x "$script_file" if [ -f "$script_file" ] && [ -x "$script_file" ]; then echo "sourcing $script_file" source "$script_file" fi done
# Validate TARGET_STACK is provided if [ -z "${TARGET_STACK}" ]; then echo "Error: TARGET_STACK is required." exit 1 fi
# Download the HPDS env files from S3 aws s3 --sse=AES256 cp "s3://$stack_s3_bucket/configs/hpds/${TARGET_STACK}/auth-hpds.env" auth-hpds.env aws s3 --sse=AES256 cp "s3://$stack_s3_bucket/configs/hpds/${TARGET_STACK}/open-hpds.env" open-hpds.env
